description: Analytic golden for a BUILD-ONCE SPATIAL FIELD materialized at setup and gathered into an ODE. `Field.area[c] = polygon_intersection_area(poly[c], poly[c], planar) = [10, 30, 60]` is a build-once geometry leaf; `Field.darea = D_c(area)` is a build-once centered first difference authored as the periodic `makearray` stencil a discretization rule lowers `D` to, giving (with dx=1) darea = [(area[2]-area[3])/2, (area[3]-area[1])/2, (area[1]-area[2])/2] = [-15, 25, -10]. The ODE D(u[c]) = darea[c] - u[c], u(0)=0 gathers the build-once `darea` per cell, so u_c(t) = darea_c (1 - e^-t) is exact. Strictly offline (no providers, no network).
